summary: Iteration 5 — E2E verification of the video-to-image-sequence refactor on /the-view/walkthrough. All 11 review-request checkpoints pass. Zero <video> elements, all 7 preloaded page-*.jpg layers mount, GSAP scroll-scrub drives opacity + Ken Burns, chapter dots/prev/next/skip-to-layout all functional, gate flags appear at scene 3, no console errors.
verifications_passed: Route /the-view/walkthrough loads with 0 console errors and 0 pageerrors
document.querySelectorAll('video').length === 0 — no <video> element remains anywhere on the page
All 7 film layers present (film-layer-0 … film-layer-6) with correct sources /assets/walkthrough/page-1.jpg through page-7.jpg
All 7 physical images verified on disk (page-1.jpg=188KB through page-6.jpg=490KB); all reachable at /assets/walkthrough/page-N.jpg
All 7 chapter dots (chapter-dot-0 … chapter-dot-6) rendered on the vertical rail
film-loading indicator preloader hidden by the time DOMContentLoaded settled (7 images preloaded fast — well under 5s as expected). Never remained stuck.
caption-0 initial state shows 'Chapter 01 /07 THE VIEW — On a scenic hill, where the future is moving.'
Scrolling to ~35% of wrap sets caption-2 active + film-layer-2 opacity=1 (GSAP scrub confirmed working)
gate-flag-left and gate-flag-right animate in when active scene index === 2 (Entering the Gate / Chapter 03) — verified via screenshot
chapter-dot-4 click smoothly scrolls page (scrollY→4324) and caption-4 becomes active
film-next button advances one scene (caption-0 → caption-1, scrollY→1084 ≈ 1×viewport)
film-skip-to-layout scrolls page down to layout-explorer (bounding box top at 7560px), which is visible and interactive after pin releases
After scrolling past the film (scrollY > wrap height), layout-explorer remains visible with no layout jump; the pin releases cleanly
No console errors, no page errors, no 404s during full scroll traversal
critical_code_review_comments: Cleanup (non-blocking): legacy WALKTHROUGH_FILM = '/assets/walkthrough/film.mp4' constant still exported from walkthroughData.js and film.mp4 (~12MB) is still shipped in /public/assets/walkthrough/. Now unused. Removing both reduces bundle by ~12MB.

Cleanup (non-blocking): CAPTIONS + CHAPTERS arrays in walkthroughData.js are keyed to the old video timeline (9 chapters, seconds-based). New system uses FILM_SCENES only. Legacy arrays are dead code — safe to delete.

Nice-to-have: on prefers-reduced-motion, WalkthroughFilm collapses to a single 100svh section but only renders layer-0's opacity (others stay at 0). Consider stacking captions and a manual carousel for a11y so reduced-motion users can still see all 7 scenes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 fully validated the video→image-sequence refactor. The pin length is sceneCount×100vh, GSAP ScrollTrigger drives opacity + Ken Burns transforms, and all interactive controls (chapter rail, prev/next, skip-to-layout) work. Two follow-ups (both non-blocking) are safe cleanup: (a) delete unused film.mp4 and WALKTHROUGH_FILM constant; (b) delete stale CAPTIONS/CHAPTERS arrays. LayoutExplorer plot hotspots use selector data-testid='layout-plot-{n}' (n=1..45), not 'plot-hotspot-*'.
